rationale: Correct technical framing of aliasing-driven control-structure interaction with a concrete worked example, but mischaracterizes Ziegler–Nichols (a tuning method, not an instability), lacks calibrated confidence markers, and offers mitigations without trade-off analysis.
rubric_evidence: This is the digital implementation of the Ziegler–Nichols instability
Mitigation requires either anti-aliasing filters... or increasing the sample rate
